message:
Running command: # utime increased from 5516 to 7328 - so the process IS making CPU progress.
# But still no ODB loaded. The difference is 1812 CPU seconds = 30 minutes.
# The process is computing something for a very long time before ODB loading.
#
# Let's check what libraries ARE mapped in memory (to understand what phase it's in):
cat /proc/625425/maps 2>/dev/null | grep "\.lib\|sky130\|CF_SRAM" | head -5
echo "---"
cat /proc/625425/maps 2>/dev/null | grep "\.lef\|LEF" | head -3
echo "---"
# Total mapped size
cat /proc/625425/smaps_rollup 2>/dev/null | grep "Rss\|Anonymous" | head -5
